name: com.cidonix.unibridge
description: Local MCP tools that let AI coding agents inspect, edit, capture, and validate Unity Editor projects through a per-project bridge and relay.

_upm.changelog:
### Added

- Added UniBridge_RuntimeStateProbe, a read-only live component state probe for Snapshot, Sample, and ListMembers workflows. It reads SerializedProperty values and reflected fields/properties over bounded editor ticks without executing arbitrary project code, supports inactive/Prefab Stage lookup through the shared scene resolver, and saves raw samples under Library/UniBridge/RuntimeStateProbe.

### Changed

- Discover, ToolGuide, DomainCatalog, and BatchActions aliases now expose runtime state probing workflows alongside runtime profiler metrics.

### Previous Changes

- UniBridge_RuntimeProfiler measures bounded ProfilerRecorder samples for runtime performance triage.
- UniBridge_ContextSnapshot includes an agentBrief onboarding block by default.
- UniBridge_WorkSession captures optional compact loaded-scene semantic baselines and review data.
- Bundled relay 1.1.0-build.15 recovers RefreshAssets connection loss caused by Unity import/domain reload.
